locking.description: Provisions bucket from the `-lock` BucketClass (with object lock enabled).

storagePool.description: Selects a specific BucketClass by storage pool name.

readonly.description: Whether the user has read-only access.

schedulingClass.description: Name of a SchedulingClass CR (cluster-scoped, group cozystack.io) applied to this application's workloads. When set, takes precedence over any tenant-level schedulingClass. Empty means inherit from the tenant.
